pages.text: $(bold)Red Mushroom Seed$()$(br2)A towering red mushroom tree. Grows on mycelium.
pages.title: Red Mushroom Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant this seed to raise its dynamic tree.$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() this seed + $(italic)Mycelium$() → $(italic)Red Mushroom$() (shapeless, one-way).
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
